title: Iranian plot to kill Trump identified separate from PA rally
shortDescription: US intelligence agencies identified an Iranian assassination effort against former President Donald Trump separate to this weekend's attack.

title: Progressives and Never Trumpers say don't pull punches on Trump
shortDescription: As the Republican convention gets underway, it’s time for Democratic ads and robust campaigning to re-start post-shooting, some anti-Trumpers say.

title: Don Jr.'s picks for Trump's VP were Carlson, Vance, he says
shortDescription: In an interview on the second day of the RNC, Donald Trump Jr. said his top picks for his dad's vice president were Tucker Carlson and JD Vance.

title: Democrats recalibrate messaging at RNC to focus on economic fallout
shortDescription: The party found a voice in New Jersey Sen. Cory Booker, who urged voters to "look for leaders that lead with love.”

title: Fact check: False claims about Trump rally shooter, investigation grow
shortDescription: An assassination attempt that left former President Donald Trump injured on July 13 led to misinformation spreading widely online.

title: Trump shooter's AR from company he toured in 2023
shortDescription: The shooter in Saturday's assassination attempt reportedly used an AR rifle manufactured by DPMS Panther Arms.

title: Man posed as Trump rally shooter as 'a joke' | Fact check
shortDescription: A social media user pretended to be Thomas Matthew Crooks in a hoax video. He said in later posts that he was not the shooter.

title: RFK Jr. apologizes to Trump for leaked video of phone call
shortDescription: Kennedy met with Trump privately two days after the Republican nominee survived an assassination attempt.

title: 'Fruity things': Glee and caution as Europe eyes Trump-Vance ticket
shortDescription: The attempted assassination of Donald Trump and the rollout of the Trump-Vance ticket has European leaders talking.

title: Here’s where Trump and Biden stand on immigration
shortDescription: The gap between President Joe Biden and Donald Trump on immigration has narrowed as voters express concern about the border.

title: Why Trump told Glenn Youngkin to 'rewrite your speech' for the RNC
shortDescription: Va. Gov. Glenn Youngkin tells RNC delegates that Donald Trump will bring 'common sense' back to Washington, something he claims he's done in Virginia

title: Former First Lady Melania Trump absent from RNC Monday night
shortDescription: The former First Lady did not appear and did not speak Monday night at the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

title: When will Trump give his RNC speech?
shortDescription: After the Republican National Convention kicked off in Milwaukee yesterday, former President Donald Trump made an appearance, but isn't scheduled to speak until Thursday evening.

title: Donald Trump selects JD Vance as running mate | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: The decision by a judge to toss Trump's classified documents case. | Dental care access is in crisis. | It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Tuesday's RNC theme puts focus on law enforcement
shortDescription: The Republican National Convention runs Thursday July 18 and each night has a unique theme.
